narrative:
33 Ohio Senate district has 234,463 registered voters, with 57.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.8%, a clear Democratic lean of 7.1 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +3.9% D−R vs +13.2% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
